modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Students encountering a blank page when accessing D2L links.

full_description_text: During a call, a help desk analyst reported that students are unable to open links in D2L. When they click on a course link, a blank white page appears instead of the expected content. This issue has been observed on various devices, including Mac, Windows, and iOS, across different browsers like Firefox, Safari, and Chrome.
short_description: Students encountering a blank page when accessing D2L links.
